name: Ningbo Kangqiang Electronics Co., Ltd
summary: Ningbo Kangqiang Electronics Co., Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, develops, produces, and sells various semiconductor packaging materials in China. It offers stamping frameworks, etching frames, bonding wires, and LED frameworks, as well as wire electrodes, production frameworks, and other products. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Ningbo, China.
